title: Log error kinds as fields
scenario: Logs should capture error category fields without relying on fragile message parsing.
instructions: Define ErrorKind, add error_kind: Option<ErrorKind> to LogFields, and implement error_event that records request_id and error_kind in a LogEvent.

hints.body: Define ErrorKind with Validation and RepositoryUnavailable variants.
Add error_kind: Option<ErrorKind> to LogFields. Span events should use None; error_event should use Some(error_kind) and LogLevel::Error.
One complete solution for Log error kinds as fields is shown below.

completionExplanation: ErrorKind is now logged as structured data on LogEvent fields, avoiding fragile parsing of message text.
